title: Open ...
text: Open ... Create or open a library or object in a library. The upper part of the dialog box displays the currently selected object. The lower part displays a tree of objects at the same level. Double-click an object to open it or to expand or collapse related objects. Icons Buttons in the upper right corner of the form enable you to create, retrieve, and navigate to objects. Table 1. Icons used in the Open form Icon Meaning Create a new object Retrieve objects Clear the form Select objects one level higher (double-click the icon for the top-level object in the upper part of the form) When creating or editing menus, the following buttons are also shown in the Open dialog. Select an icon to display the list of available menus of that type in the selected library. Table 2. Icons used in the Open form for Menus Icon Meaning Display or create menu bars Display or create pop-up menus Display or create drop-down menus How to Enter the name of the object to open it, if it already exists, or to create it. If an object of that name does not exist, you will be prompted to create it. Alternatively: To open an object, select it in the list of objects displayed. To create a new object, click the icon, and enter the name of the new object. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
